allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\dciel\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\edge-backend" -Recurse | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\dciel\\edge-backend" -Recurse | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer -and $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' -and $_.FullName -notmatch '\\.log$' -and $_.Name -notin @\('users.json','daily.json','config.json','watcher.log','server.err.log','server.out.log','server.live.log'\) } | Select-Object @{N='RelPath';E={$_.FullName.Replace\('C:\\Users\\dciel\\edge-backend\\',''\)}} | Sort-Object RelPath | Format-Table -AutoSize)
